content:
I have been working on the syntax for my own functional programming language to use with Rust, and I came across Roc-lang via a youtube video with Developer Voices (which was a fantastic video!). The language is very similar to my design goals, and I wanted to share my syntax approach to get feedback and maybe contribute to ROC lang as well. https://docs.google.com/document/d/12lquA36ARr1h91uadjtQT9YMn0zMnv6rrkumECZRY90/edit?usp=sharing

I really like the direction Roclang is taking and will see where I can contribute in the future.
